{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 6.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "Central African Federation imposed amid nationalist and union mobilization", "reasoning": "The copper boom and settler-dominated Federation (1953) substantially strengthened state fiscal and coercive capacity, while African unions and nationalist parties grew despite emergency crackdowns\u2014yielding a net society gain tempered by repression."}
